title: Better Wake-up Position
description: Make you wake up at starting sleeping location
body:
**Main function**: Change the position after waking up to the position where you stood before sleeping, instead of next to the bed. If the place you were standing on before sleeping is occupied, return to the bed.

**Usage**: Set the game rule **wakeUpAtStartingSleepingLocation** to true **(the default is true, no need to modify)**.

**Shortcut command**: `/gamerule wakeUpAtStartingSleepingLocation true`
